_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Specify changes to collection plan and/or operational environment that necessitate re-tasking or re-directing of collection assets and resources.
reference_document_element_description: Maintain and optimize existing BI assets, including performance tuning, data model updates, and deprecation of unused content.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-002 (OP, cosine: 0.459), OP-T-001 (OP, cosine: 0.454).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.1/10 (raw 0.206). Shared vocabulary: [assets]. DCWF-only terms [changes, collection, directing, environment, necessitate, operational] vs WIDAI-only terms [bi, content, data, deprecation, existing, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.857, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Specify changes to collection plan and/or operational environment that necessita" and "Maintain and optimize existing BI assets, including performance tuning, data mod". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.479 > STS 0.206 (gap +0.273). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [assets] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [assets]. DCWF-only: [changes, collection, directing, environment, necessitate, operational]. WIDAI-only: [bi, content, data, deprecation, existing, maintain].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 100.0% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.273 with low STS 0.206. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
